alert: A subset of users sees high latency while overall traffic volume is normal.
root_cause: load balancer sticky sessions causing backend hotspot

evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:load_balancer: Load balancer metrics show severe backend traffic skew.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:load_balancer:STICKY_SESS: Load balancer config has STICKY_SESSIONS enabled.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:web_server: Web logs show one backend overloaded while other workers are idle.

logs: WARN backend traffic skew primary=92 secondary=8

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(load balancer sticky sessions causing backend hotspot, disable sticky sessions)
distractors: Restarting web_server may temporarily move sessions but does not fix the balancing policy.
